commands.review_summary:
The PR adds RSS transcript URL validation, manual redirect revalidation, and regression tests for direct loopback and redirect-to-loopback transcript targets.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source inspection: a public hostname that resolves to a private address passes `assertSafeTranscriptUrl` because only the URL hostname string is checked before `fetchImpl` runs DNS. I did not run a live network reproduction because the review checkout is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs maintainer/security review and contributor real-behavior proof before merge; the DNS/pinning repair is clear, but this external security PR is not ready for an automated repair or merge lane.

target.title: fix: guard rss transcript fetches
target.body:
## Summary

This hardens RSS `<podcast:transcript>` fetching so feed-discovered transcript URLs cannot directly target local/private network hosts, and so redirects are revalidated before they are followed.

Changes:
- validate nested transcript URLs before fetching them;
- reject non-HTTP(S), localhost, IPv4 private/link-local/loopback/shared/multicast, and matching IPv6 literal ranges;
- switch transcript fetches to `redirect: "manual"` and revalidate each redirect `Location` before following it;
- add regression coverage for direct loopback transcript URLs and public-to-loopback redirects.

## Validation

- `pnpm -s test tests/security.rss-transcript-ssrf.test.ts`
- `git diff --check && pnpm -s typecheck`
- `pnpm -s format:check`
- `pnpm -s lint`

VulnWeave gate also completed with verdict `OK` for the finding/patch notes.
target.author: hinotoi-agent
